title: HO-Library
body:
# HO-Library

## What's it?
HO-Library is a lib mod.  
This mod is made by [HO-Artisan](https://github.com/HO-Artisan).  
We use it to develop Mod more simply and intelligently.

## Content
- A ready-made modular recipe  
- A simple and easy-to-use registrar(Just use to reduce the amount of code)  

More content will be added in the future.
